alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services in Strategy and Operations with two promotions; experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs
alignments.job_requirement: Operations Business Partner role in Strategy & Operations department

gaps.gap: No job description provided—only role title, company, and department cached from careers page. No access to actual role responsibilities, required skills, growth/tech-specific mandates, or seniority level.
gaps.mitigation: Obtain full job description. Assess whether the role is Growth product ops, Tech infrastructure ops, or commercial ops; confirm L4–L5 scope and specific transformation or strategic focus.

gaps.gap: Geographic mismatch: role is Sydney-based; candidate location unknown. If relocation is required and candidate is unwilling or unable, this is a blocker.
gaps.mitigation: Confirm candidate willingness and ability to relocate to Sydney.

gaps.gap: Canva is a growth-stage, design-first consumer tech company; candidate's Google Devices and Services background may not directly translate to Canva's product, market, or operational model.
gaps.mitigation: Identify specific operational or transformation projects from candidate's Google work that apply to a design/creator platform scaling in consumer markets.

output.summary: Insufficient job description makes role assessment impossible. Candidate's Google Ops & Strategy background aligns with the Operations Business Partner title and department, but without actual JD scope, responsibilities, and growth/tech focus, alignment cannot be evaluated. Geographic location and Canva domain fit are also unknown unknowns. Request full job description and confirm relocation willingness before proceeding.
